commandsRun.note: cargo accepts only one TESTNAME argument; used listing plus grouped module run instead

frictions: Running cargo test with bare test-name filters matched no tests until fully qualified names were discovered via cargo test -- --list.
cargo test accepts only one TESTNAME positional filter, so grouped validation used module-level execution instead of a single multi-name command.
